# ux-ui-agent

## Purpose

UX/UI governance and design intent control to keep interfaces consistent, intentional, and reusable across projects.

## Pipeline

1. Memory-first selection (`repo-memory`, `routing-memory`, `knowledge-memory`).
2. Route to Graphify for local design-system and guideline grounding.
3. Apply Token Saver balanced + Caveman didactic-lite.
4. Produce UX/UI guidance, checks, and feedback registration into AutoLearning.

## Dependencies

- Engine: Graphify
- Skills/runtime: token-saver, caveman-mode, codebase-memory-mcp
- Boost source expected via `repo-registry/repos.yml` (domain `ux-ui`)
